law_patterns.msg: No privileged dimensions: use ctx.dims['time'] / ctx.dims['geo'], never ctx.year/regionId.

DataSpec must be declarative (Constructor-ready): no function-valued config key (getRows/val/fetch: (ctx)=>… or : function…). Behavior lives in the renderer; config carries a DataSpec discriminant. (Bare val()/fetch()/if/switch calls are NOT scanned here — a whole-file regex cannot tell a DataSpec literal from renderer code; that boundary belongs in an AST/eslint DataSpec-scoped rule.)

Dependency arrow: engine/core must not import engine/react (core ← react, not the reverse). [non-authoritative fast pre-lint tripwire; SSOT = eslint no-restricted-imports in platform/eslint.config.js].

engine/react must stay app-agnostic: no imports from plugins/ or apps/ (app-specifics live downstream). [non-authoritative fast pre-lint tripwire; SSOT = eslint no-restricted-imports in platform/eslint.config.js].
engine/react must be locale-agnostic: no Georgian codepoints and no 'ka'/'ka-GE' locale literals. Move UI strings and locale constants to plugins/ or the app i18n catalog.

Possible hardcoded secret (AWS AKIA key / PEM private key / Bearer token / high-entropy api_key|secret|token assignment). Secrets never live in source (09/§Security) — move to an env var or vault and rotate the exposed value.
